pathway_steps.title: Foundation Building
bullets: Complete comprehensive training program and obtain all necessary certifications for real estate licensing
Build professional network with experienced mentors and industry connections
Develop marketing materials and establish personal brand identity
Set up business infrastructure including CRM systems and client databases

pathway_steps.title: Market Entry
bullets: Launch targeted marketing campaigns across multiple digital platforms and social media channels
Begin prospecting and lead generation activities through various channels
Conduct initial client consultations and property showings
Establish referral partnerships with complementary service providers

pathway_steps.title: Growth Phase
bullets: Expand client base through exceptional service and word-of-mouth referrals
Develop specialized expertise in luxury property markets or specific neighborhoods
Build team of support staff including assistants and coordinators
Implement advanced marketing strategies including video content and virtual tours
